description: Break-even characterization of the engine's single-request self-speculative (early-exit) decoding: where it helps (speedup>1), breaks even (=1), or hurts (<1), across draft depth (exit layer L) and draft length K.
scope_note: Single-request self-speculation only (max_batch_size=1, the path scheduler.py runs when one request decodes). No batched speculation, no draft/target. CUDA graphs off for both vanilla and spec. EOS disabled so token counts match.
